message:
ci: add GitHub Actions pipeline — typecheck, tests, benchmark

- TypeScript compilation check (tsc --noEmit)
- Workers pool tests (vitest run with workerd runtime)
- Benchmark job with verbose timing output in step summary

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  typecheck:
+    name: TypeScript
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm run typecheck
+
+  test:
+    name: Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm run test:workers
+
+  benchmark:
+    name: Benchmark
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [typecheck, test]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+      - run: npm ci
+      - name: Run tests with timing
+        run: npm run test:workers -- --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
+      - name: Summary
+        run: |
+          echo "## Test Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          tail -20 test-output.txt >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
